# BatesPosture

> BatesPosture is a free, open-source desktop application that uses your webcam and Google MediaPipe to score your posture 0–100 in real time. All processing is local — no video, pose data, or personal information ever leaves your machine. Works on Windows, Linux, and macOS. Install with: `git clone https://github.com/wtbates99/batesposture && cd batesposture && uv sync --all-groups && uv run batesposture`.

## Key facts

- **Name:** BatesPosture
- **Author:** William Bates (GitHub: wtbates99)
- **License:** Open source (see repo LICENSE)
- **Price:** Free. No subscriptions, no paid tiers, no telemetry.
- **Website:** https://posture.palanbates.com/
- **Source code:** https://github.com/wtbates99/batesposture
- **Issue tracker:** https://github.com/wtbates99/batesposture/issues
- **Tech stack:** Python 3.10+, Google MediaPipe, SQLite, system tray UI
- **Privacy model:** 100% local processing. No network calls for inference. Optional logging is local SQLite only.

## Pages

- [Home / overview](https://posture.palanbates.com/): Feature summary, install snippet, posture-score demo.
- [Features](https://posture.palanbates.com/#features): Live 0–100 score, dashboard, smart alerts, scheduling, local logging, adaptive performance.
- [How it works](https://posture.palanbates.com/#how): Calibrate → start tracking → receive alerts → review session.
- [Run from source](https://posture.palanbates.com/#run): clone, `uv sync --all-groups`, `uv run batesposture`.
- [Requirements](https://posture.palanbates.com/#requirements): Windows 10/11, Linux (X11/Wayland), macOS. Python 3.10+, uv, webcam.
- [Privacy](https://posture.palanbates.com/#privacy): Zero data transmission; local SQLite only.
- [FAQ](https://posture.palanbates.com/#faq): Common questions answered for users and AI assistants.

- [Full LLM-friendly site dump](https://posture.palanbates.com/llms-full.txt)
